wine_restaurants.name: Auberge du Cep
wine_restaurants.address: 11 Rue des Quatre Vents, 69820 Fleurie, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Gastronomic French regional; Beaujolais terroir-driven; exceptional sauces and jus
wine_restaurants.description: Fleurie's Michelin-starred restaurant on the village square, operated by chef Aurelien Merot. Regional produce drives the kitchen: Beaujolais-sauce preparations, local zander, and seasonal vegetables. Cellar specialises in aged Beaujolais Crus.
wine_restaurants.tip: The lunchtime menu du marche at EUR 33 is one of the best-value Michelin meals in the Beaujolais Crus.

wine_restaurants.name: Le 1030 at Chateau de Pizay
wine_restaurants.cuisine: French gastronomic; best local products from Beaujolais and Lyon region; paired with estate wines
wine_restaurants.description: The gastronomic restaurant of the 80-hectare Chateau de Pizay wine estate, led by chef Yoann Gasselin. Dishes showcase best local products from Beaujolais and Lyon with a focus on estate wine pairings from six appellations produced on the property.

wine_restaurants.name: Lucienne at Auberge du Paradis
wine_restaurants.address: 70 Rue des Crus du Beaujolais, 71570 Saint-Amour-Bellevue, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Gourmet gastronomic; 1 Michelin star; regional produce; tasting menus
wine_restaurants.description: The starred restaurant of Auberge du Paradis in the Saint-Amour cru village. Chef-led tasting menus explore the northern edge of Beaujolais with produce from the Maconnais and Beaujolais borderlands. Exceptional wine list spanning both appellations.

verified.address_quoted: 70 rue des Crus du Beaujolais, 71570 Saint-Amour-Bellevue

wine_restaurants.name: Le Coq a Julienas
wine_restaurants.address: Ancienne Place du Marche, 69840 Julienas, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Bistronomic French; Beaujolais regional terroir; seasonal market produce
wine_restaurants.description: A Beaujolais institution since 1923 on the ancient market square of Julienas, now run by chef Marie Dias. Seasonal bistronomic menus respect classic Beaujolais terroir whilst reinventing traditional dishes. The wine list prioritises local Julienas producers.

wine_restaurants.name: La Table du Brouilly
wine_restaurants.address: 26 Montee de la Chapelle, 69220 Saint-Lager, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern bistronomic; natural wine focus; local and seasonal; organic produce
wine_restaurants.description: A friendly modern bistro at the foot of Mont Brouilly, with over 100 wine references in a self-service cellar. Local seasonal produce prepared with a natural wine ethos; strong Brouilly and Cote de Brouilly focus.
wine_restaurants.tip: The self-service cellar lets you browse the full reference list before choosing your bottle; rare in a formal restaurant setting.

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurant Noemys Morgon
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Regional French; all 10 Beaujolais Crus on the wine list; Beaujolais-inflected seasonal menu
wine_restaurants.description: The hotel restaurant of Noemys Morgon serves regional culinary specialties on a terrace and in a spacious dining room, with a wine list covering all 10 Beaujolais Crus. Dinner menu from EUR 34.50.

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurant Rouge et Blanc at Les Maritonnes
wine_restaurants.address: 513 Route de Fleurie D32, 71570 Romaneche-Thorins, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: French brasserie; Bresse chicken; regional products from Burgundy and Beaujolais; wine cellar centrepiece
wine_restaurants.description: The restaurant of Les Maritonnes hotel at the foot of Moulin-a-Vent vineyards, conceived by Georges Blanc. Two prominent wine cellars frame the dining room; local Moulin-a-Vent and Chenas producers feature prominently on the list.

verified.address_quoted: 513 route de Fleurie - D32, 71570 Romaneche Thorins

wine_restaurants.name: La Robe Rouge
wine_restaurants.address: Le Four a Chaux, 69910 Villie-Morgon, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Plant-forward creative; Beaujolais natural wine list; local seasonal produce
wine_restaurants.description: Chef Thomas Guignier's restaurant in Villie-Morgon pairs plant-forward, instinctive cuisine with a natural Beaujolais wine list drawn from nearby Morgon producers. The attached wine shop allows guests to take bottles home.

wine_restaurants.name: Auberge de la Madone
wine_restaurants.address: 1230 Route de la Madone, 69820 Fleurie, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Traditional Beaujolais; fresh local produce; panoramic vineyard terrace; menus from EUR 29
wine_restaurants.description: The auberge restaurant of Domaine de la Madone on the Fleurie hillside serves traditional Beaujolais cuisine in a room seating 70 or on a panoramic terrace overlooking the Saone valley and estate vineyards.

wine_restaurants.name: Le Cote de Brouilly
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Regional French bouchon lyonnais; Beaujolais-country classics; wine list of Brouilly and Cote de Brouilly producers
wine_restaurants.description: A bouchon-style restaurant in the Brouilly village of Odenas serving regional Lyonnais-Beaujolais classics. The wine list concentrates on Brouilly and Cote de Brouilly producers, placing the restaurant firmly in its appellation context.

wine_restaurants.name: La Maison des Beaujolais Restaurant
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Beaujolais brasserie; regional charcuterie; daily menu; open all day
wine_restaurants.description: The restaurant of La Maison des Beaujolais serves a daily menu of regional Beaujolais cuisine paired with the 600-reference cellar. Traditional macon pates, rosette de Lyon, and Beaujolais-braised dishes feature prominently.

wine_restaurants.name: Josephine a Table at Auberge du Paradis
wine_restaurants.address: 70 Rue des Crus du Beaujolais, 71570 Saint-Amour-Bellevue, France
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Bistro family cooking; grandmother-style regional dishes; Saint-Amour cru wines by the glass
wine_restaurants.description: The more casual bistro offering within Auberge du Paradis estate, delivering family-style cuisine rooted in Burgundian tradition. Pairs naturally with Saint-Amour cru wines from surrounding estates on the Beaujolais-Maconnais border.

verified.address_quoted: 70 rue des Crus du Beaujolais, 71570 Saint-Amour-Bellevue
